chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Crl. Transfer Appln. No.S-12 of 2026 [Zameeruddin Versus The State & Another] DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A.No.483/2026. 2. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 3. For hearing of main case. 02.02.2026 Mr. Atta Hussain Qadri, advocate for the applicant. -.-.-.-.-.-.- Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry, J;- The applicant, who is complainant of subject FIR, seeks transfer of the case from the Court of 1st Additional Sessions Judge/MCTC Kamber. It is averred that the learned Judge misbehaved with the complainant which gives cause to apprehend bias. However, no transfer can be ordered on the basis of such a bald and vague averment. Learned counsel for the applicant then submits that the learned Judge has acquitted one accused without cause. However, the case diary dated 13.01.2026 reflects though one accused was acquitted, the other was convicted. Therefore, the contention that acquittal of one accused gives cause to apprehend bias also has no force. Resultantly, the application is dismissed in limine. Judge M Yousuf Panhwar/**
